domain: Norwegian rosemaling (decorative folk painting, 1700s-1850s): 2 building-block strokes C-stroke (single arc) + S-stroke (double-curve); regional styles Telemark/Hallingdal/Rogaland/Os with distinct C:S proportions and scale parameters; compositions built up by combining strokes into kurver scrolls + florals; inspired by Baroque/Rococo acanthus; used on daily objects (ale bowls, chairs, trunks)
specific_mechanism: ROSEMALING-C-S-STROKE-CURVE-VOCAB-DEFECT: 2-primitive curve-vocabulary decomposition + winding-number topological signature + regional-style proportion + KL-deviation defect identification. (1) Primitive curve vocabulary V = {C-stroke, S-stroke} — discrete 2-token vocabulary. (2) Per attention head h, compute attention-curve over position axis a_h(p); represent as sequence of primitives by detecting monotone arcs (C) and double-curve direction changes (S). (3) Winding-number-like signature: w_h = (#monotone-arcs, #direction-changes, branching-count) — topological 3-tuple. (4) Regional-style proportion: each layer l learns preferred distribution P_l(C, S) = (alpha_l, 1 - alpha_l); 4 'regions' (Telemark/Hallingdal/Rogaland/Os) correspond to 4 clusters in (alpha, scale) space. (5) Composition-defect detection: for layer l, KL(empirical_stroke_dist_h, P_l) > tau_def -> head h flagged defective (out-of-style). (6) Repair: defective head re-aligned via projection ofa_h(p) onto regional-style mean. (7) Building-block reduction: any higher-level attention pattern (florals, scrolls) decomposed via C+S primitives — explicit compositional vocabulary. (8) Differs from R476 IDRIJA-LACE-DEFECT (graph-minor isomorphism catalog) and R489 MEDALLION-ROT-DEFECT (4-fold rotation equivariance) and R501 BAGAJDA-BORE-PROFILE-ATLAS (singular spectrum centroid mahalanobis) by 2-primitive C-S curve vocabulary + winding-number signature + regional-style 4-cluster proportion + KL out-of-style defect.
llm_application: ROSEMALING-C-S-STROKE-CURVE-VOCAB-DEFECT 2-primitive C-S vocabulary attention-curve decomposition + winding-number-like topological signature (monotone-arcs + direction-changes + branching) + per-layer regional-style C:S proportion learning + KL-deviation composition-defect identification + projection-to-regional-style mean repair. Differs from R103 KNOT-CoT TDA. R475 MAEDEUP-KNOT-J. R476 IDRIJA-LACE-DEFECT (closest — graph-minor catalog). R489 MEDALLION-ROT-DEFECT (rotation equivariance). R501 BAGAJDA-BORE-PROFILE-ATLAS (closest — spectrum-centroid mahalanobis). Differs from Circuit Tracing 2025 + Developmental Interpretability 2508.15841 + Attention Head Entropy ICLR 2025 + P0 Sink Circuit 2603.06591 by 2-primitive C-S curve vocabulary + winding-number signature + regional-style proportion + KL-deviation defect identification. Differs by 2-PRIMITIVE CURVE VOCAB + WINDING-NUMBER SIGNATURE + REGIONAL-STYLE PROPORTION + KL-DEFECT.
novelty_claim: Circuit Tracing + Developmental Interpretability + Attention Head Entropy + P0 Sink Circuit literature cover attention-pattern interpretability + defect-score space. ROSEMALING-C-S-STROKE-CURVE-VOCAB-DEFECT adds (a) explicit 2-primitive C-S vocabulary decomposition + (b) winding-number-like topological signature + (c) per-layer regional-style C:S proportion + (d) KL-deviation out-of-style defect identification. Recombination — borderline lookup.
